evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: data governance and Data Mesh implementation at scale; own the end-to-end testing pipeline
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Mixed: rigour signals (data governance, testing pipeline ownership, data mesh) balanced with velocity framing (AI agentic workflows, acceleration of capabilities).
evidence.domain_risk: Fintech (payments, savings, investing platform); high domain risk due to financial/regulatory exposure.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: High: fintech sector building financial platform for 6M users with explicit regulatory/governance language.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Named tools in responsibilities (dbt, Data Mesh, AI workflows), dedicated B2C Analytics team, growing function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Lead Design Data Architecture – Drive the development of the Data Mesh layer by designing robust data models and building pipelines
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Hiring manager: precise methodology (Data Mesh, federated strategy, data ownership models) and specific technical approach.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: consumer funnel (Acquisition, Engagement, Retention, Monetisation); Marketing; Product
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Product-focused: primary mission is consumer lifecycle optimization and product/growth metrics.
evidence.autonomy_level: Act as a strategic partner; Lead initiatives across diverse business domains
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Strategic: autonomous ownership of data strategy, AI workflow design, and cross-domain initiative leadership.
evidence.ai_role: Comfortable using AI tools day-to-day; Basic to mid-level proficiency with Claude is a strong plus; Experience interacting with agents programmatically via APIs
evidence.ai_role_explanation: AI user: candidate expected to use AI tools (Claude, agents) daily for analytics, automation, and analysis generation.
evidence.testing_framing: Drive Testing Initiatives – Own the end-to-end testing pipeline, from opportunity identification to experiment design
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Responsibility: testing and experimentation framed as owned accountability in core responsibilities.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: data governance; Data Mesh implementation at scale; governed data ownership
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate loss aversion: governance and data ownership are concerns but secondary to analytics capability and speed.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Design and implement AI-powered agentic workflows; Drive the development of the Data Mesh layer
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Greenfield: building new AI workflows, Data Mesh layer, and analytical capabilities from scratch.
evidence.loss_aversion: Data governance and Data Mesh implementation at scale, ensuring scalable and governed data ownership — preventing uncontrolled data sprawl.
